data.title: Google Quantum AI's New Willow Chip Can Do in Minutes That Supercomputers Would Take 10 Septillion Years
data.description: Google Quantum AI announced its latest quantum chip Willow that can reduce errors exponentially, a significant milestone in its decade-long journey.

data.title: Reddit Stock Gets Boost From Morgan Stanley: Analyst Sees 'Best In Class Growth'
data.description: Morgan Stanley upgrades Reddit stock to Overweight with $200 price target, citing potential for explosive growth and $300 bull case.

data.title: Microsoft Shareholders To Vote On Bitcoin Investment Proposal
data.description: Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) shareholders will cast their votes on whether the company should publicly assess adding Bitcoin to its balance sheet on Dec. 10.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Drug Expert Dr. Carl Hart Slams Cannabis Prohibition Amid Hemp-THC Surge
data.description: Dr. Carl Hart discusses hemp THC, unregulated markets, and the need for federal cannabis legalization to reduce risks and protect consumers.

data.title: Biogen Downgraded On Pipeline Setbacks And Leqembi Sales Slowdown
data.description: Jefferies downgrades Biogen with a reduced price target, citing pipeline setbacks, slow Leqembi sales, and challenges from declining Ocrevus royalties.
